findings.guidance: Specification "TaskFlow — Collaborative Task Management Platform" tem 1 épico(s). Mínimo configurado: 2. Decomponha o trabalho em mais épicos pra habilitar paralelização e fronteiras claras de responsabilidade. Cada épico deve representar um conjunto coeso de funcionalidades que pode ser implementado e validado independentemente.

findings.message: Ticket "tkt-1-4" (wave 3) deletes file "packages/core/src/temp-output.ts" created by ticket "tkt-1-1" (wave 1)

tkt-1-1.message: Ticket "tkt-1-4" (wave 3) deletes "packages/core/src/temp-output.ts", but ticket "tkt-1-1" (wave 1) creates that same file. Creating a file in one wave and deleting it in another is futile work at planning time — except in legitimate cases like intermediate build artifacts. Likely either: (1) the creating ticket should not exist (remove the filesToBeCreated entry), or (2) the deletion is wrong (the file is needed — remove the filesToBeDeleted entry), or (3) the two tickets represent incompatible phases and should be consolidated/rewritten. If this is a legitimate intermediate build-artifact flow (rare in planning specs), justify it in the description of both tickets.

tkt-1-4.message: Ticket "tkt-1-4" (wave 3) deletes "packages/core/src/temp-output.ts", but ticket "tkt-1-1" (wave 1) creates that same file. Creating a file in one wave and deleting it in another is futile work at planning time — except in legitimate cases like intermediate build artifacts. Likely either: (1) the creating ticket should not exist (remove the filesToBeCreated entry), or (2) the deletion is wrong (the file is needed — remove the filesToBeDeleted entry), or (3) the two tickets represent incompatible phases and should be consolidated/rewritten.
